headline: Stable negative sentiment (score: -100.4)
key_insights: Frustrations trending up 229% over 7 days (strong momentum)
sentiment_commentary:
• Frustrations dominate with 183 quotes, overwhelmingly at strong intensity (155 strong quotes) - people are expressing serious anger and dissatisfaction today.

• This frustration level of 113.4 is near the peak of the 61-day range, making it an exceptionally high day for complaints.

• Fears improved significantly from yesterday's low while optimism also recovered, but frustrations more than doubled from yesterday's already-elevated levels.
methodology: See METHODOLOGY.md. Scores use z-score normalization with empirically-derived intensity weights from analytics_config.yaml. Alerts at |z| >= threshold (configurable, default 2.0 for p < 0.05).
